since_last: 64% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +2.35%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 64% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.12% · BTC +2.33% · Gold +2.24% · Nasdaq100 +0.65%. 64% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +2.35%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +2.35%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.08%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -24.40%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +8.62%, OKTA +7.59%, DELL +5.47%, PANW +5.36%, ZS +5.08%. Laggards: IBM -24.40%, SKHY -8.63%, WDAY -6.63%, NOW -5.46%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.97% at $141.88
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.97% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
